sub.faq.title: FAQ
sub.faq.q1: What's the difference between Free and Premium?
sub.faq.a1: Free plan limits AI workout generation to 4 per day with 1 growth prediction report. Premium unlocks unlimited AI plans, full growth reports, detailed analysis, and per-session AI reports.
sub.faq.a2: Payment is securely processed via KakaoPay. Your payment info is encrypted and the subscription auto-renews monthly.
sub.faq.a3: Currently only KakaoPay is available. We are working on adding more payment options.
sub.faq.a4: Go to Profile tab > Subscription management. After cancellation, premium features remain active until the end of the current billing period.
sub.faq.a5.prefix: Refunds are available within 7 days of payment if no premium features were used. See the
sub.faq.a5.suffix: for details. Contact support for refund inquiries.
sub.faq.q6: How do I download the app?
sub.faq.a6:
Add to your home screen from Chrome/Safari to use it like a native app.

[Android]
1. Open ohunjal AI in Chrome
2. Tap ⋮ menu (top right)
3. Select 'Add to Home screen'

[iPhone/iPad]
1. Open ohunjal AI in Safari
2. Tap share button (□↑)
3. Select 'Add to Home Screen'
